sizing_rule.note: For mechanical system traders: estimate optimal f using parametric technique on adjustable probability distribution of outcomes (equalized or nonequalized). For non-system traders: use scenario planning approach. Specific f value not provided by author; parametric analysis required on historical trade distribution.

source_rule_text: For mechanical trading systems, use parametric technique on adjustable distribution function with equalized or nonequalized data to estimate optimal f; for non-system traders, use scenario planning approach to determine position sizing.
